title: psorospermum cornifolium
intro: Psorospermum cornifolium, also known as the Calumba root, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as nausea and diarrhea, due to its bitter and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Psorospermum cornifolium include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate rheumatic pains. Herbal preparations of Psorospermum cornifolium are available in the form of decoctions, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
